/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/trading_engine.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/trading_engine.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trading_engine.dir/src/data_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trading_engine.dir/src/smaindicator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trading_engine.dir/src/portfolio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trading_engine.dir/src/backtester.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trading_engine.dir/src/metrics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trading_engine.dir/src/reporter.cpp.o -o trading_engine
